Bill Gates founded Microsoft Corporation in 1975 together with Paul Allen. Microsoft became one of the world's largest technology companies and revolutionized personal computing.
Bill Gates married Melinda French in 1994. They have three children together: Jennifer, Rory, and Phoebe. The couple divorced in 2021 after 27 years of marriage.
Melinda French Gates was born on August 15, 1964, in Dallas, Texas. She graduated from Duke University with a bachelor's degree in computer science and economics.
Microsoft is headquartered in Redmond, Washington. The company was incorporated in New Mexico in 1981 before moving its headquarters to Washington state.
Paul Allen co-founded Microsoft with Bill Gates. Allen left Microsoft in 1983 due to health issues but remained on the board until 2000.
Satya Nadella became the CEO of Microsoft in 2014, succeeding Steve Ballmer. Under Nadella's leadership, Microsoft's market value has increased significantly.
Steve Ballmer served as CEO of Microsoft from 2000 to 2014. He was the 30th employee hired by Bill Gates and Paul Allen.
The Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation was established in 2000. It focuses on global health, poverty alleviation, and education initiatives worldwide.
Lionel Messi, also known as Leo Messi, is an Argentine professional footballer. He joined Inter Miami in 2023 after leaving Paris Saint-Germain.
Leo Messi won the FIFA World Cup with Argentina in 2022, defeating France in the final. He is considered one of the greatest football players of all time.
Inter Miami is a Major League Soccer team based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. The team was founded by David Beckham in 2018.
Cristiano Ronaldo plays for Al-Nassr in Saudi Arabia. He previously played for Manchester United, Real Madrid, and Juventus.
Kylian Mbappé is a French professional footballer who currently plays for Real Madrid. He previously played for Paris Saint-Germain.
Paris Saint-Germain, commonly known as PSG, is a French football club based in Paris. The club is owned by Qatar Sports Investments.
Elon Musk is the CEO of Tesla and SpaceX. He also acquired Twitter in 2022 and renamed it to X.
Tesla was founded in 2003 by Martin Eberhard and Marc Tarpenning. Elon Musk joined as chairman of the board and later became CEO.
SpaceX was founded by Elon Musk in 2002 with the goal of reducing space transportation costs and enabling the colonization of Mars.
Jeff Bezos founded Amazon in 1994. He stepped down as CEO in 2021 but remains executive chairman of the company.
Amazon is headquartered in Seattle, Washington. The company started as an online bookstore before expanding into various product categories.
Blue Origin is a space company founded by Jeff Bezos in 2000. The company is developing vehicles for suborbital and orbital spaceflight.
